title: About Me
description: I’m **Arnas Lebedevas**, a **Full Stack Developer** who enjoys building reliable, well structured software. I focus on creating applications that are **scalable**, **maintainable**, and based on **clean architecture**, with careful decisions and attention to detail.

I currently work at **Solutionlab Production** and also contribute to **Qubic**. My experience in **consulting** and **development** has helped me solve complex problems and deliver **practical, effective solutions**.
